title: OMORaft
body:
# OMORaft (OMORI + Minecraft)

This texturepack changes some textures to items from the OMORI. Texturepack will be updated by changing the textures of objects to those that look like objects or environments in the OMORI game.

### If you are a _fan_ / _like the game_ / _have played OMORI_, then this texture pack will definitely suit you in your survival or PVP servers


**>** There will also be a video review on the YouTube channel for each release

## For example: what does this addon change:
1. > The texture of _totem of undying_ will change to _Life Jam_ (fans or those who have played OMORI will recognize the jar with the smiling face, resurrecting the player during the battle)
2. > Textures of _all swords_ will change to textures of _Omori knives_
3. > The textures of the flowers will change to the familiar vegetation from the game
### And much more!

**<!>** This texturepack may not be compatible with other textures, or it may not work well. To make everything work without problems, disable some texturepacks at your discretion.

## Follow the news, release dates and teasers on my Discord server:
https://discord.gg/cgBUuYTQuT
